scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace frontend run dev" "npm --workspace backend run dev"
scripts.clean:dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['frontend/.next','frontend/node_modules/.cache','frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Next.js dev cache cleaned');"
scripts.build: npm --workspace frontend run build && npm --workspace backend run build
